prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical portrait photograph of a 25-year-old man holding one calico cat close to his chest. The man has thick dark brown hair with light brown highlights, styled in a natural messy voluminous look, with short facial hair visible along the jaw and chin, and he wears a soft loose white robe or relaxed linen outfit with an open collar and folded sleeves. His face is intentionally hidden by one centered opaque vertical rectangle in a warm medium-brown skin-tone color, covering from the forehead down past the mouth while leaving the hair, ears, beard edge, neck, clothing, and cat visible. The cat is a single fluffy calico with orange, black, and white fur, large pale green eyes, pink nose, white muzzle and chest, and upright ears, nestled in the crook of the man’s arm and looking directly at the camera. Use a dreamy cinematic aesthetic with shallow depth of field, soft pastel beige and blush background, subtle greenery bokeh on the left and right, warm diffused natural light, creamy skin tones, high-end editorial portrait quality, and gentle romantic softness. Composition: close-up bust portrait, man centered, cat in the lower left-to-center foreground, white clothing filling the lower right, vertical 3:4 crop. Add a small black watermark in the bottom-right corner reading PROMPT by: Mr. Tariq in a mix of small uppercase sans-serif and handwritten signature script. No extra people, no additional animals, no harsh shadows, no cartoon style.
